When Venus passes through the star PurvSsadha, aquatic,
animals and products will suffer (or people will be troubled by
aquatic animals etc.); when he is in Uttara^adha, diseases will
spread; when he is in Sravana, people will suffer from ear-diseases;
and when he is in Dhanistha, heretics will be in trouble.
«N %
tprrta fox: n n
When Venus is in Satabhisaj, distillers of liquor as well as
drunkards will suffer. While passing through Purvabhadrapada he
afflicts gamblers and the people of Kuru and Paficala countries.
However, there will be good rains.
^TqT?n g n w
While tenanting the star Uttarabhadrapada Venus will
destroy roots and fruits; Revatl, travellers and marching troops;
Asvini, keepers of horses; and Bharani, Kiratas (hunters) and
Yavanas.
